ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Emergency Signaling Mirror Camping Emergency Tool

Stay prepared with the ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Emergency Signaling Mirror! This lightweight, double-sided mirror features a sleek stainless steel finish for durability and clear reflection.

Key Features

  • DOUBLE-SIDED REFLECTIVE DESIGN - Features a high-quality stainless steel finish on both sides for reliable, clear signaling in emergencies.
  • DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL CONSTRUCTION - Built to withstand rugged outdoor conditions, ensuring long-lasting performance.
  • CONVENIENT LANYARD HOLE & SIGNALING SIGHT - Includes a lanyard hole and sighting tool for easy attachment and precise emergency signaling.
  • COMPACT & LIGHTWEIGHT - Measures 3 x 4" with a slim 0.03mm thickness, making it portable and perfect for camping, hiking, or survival kits.
  • ENHANCED OUTDOOR SAFETY - Ideal for adventurers, providing a critical tool for visibility and rescue in remote locations.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: SM-1PK
  • UPC: 060886210429
  • Color: Silver

Equipped with a lanyard hole and signaling sight, it’s perfect for emergency signaling in the wild. Measuring 3 x 4" with a slim 0.03mm thickness, it’s easy to carry on any adventure. Ideal for camping, hiking, or survival kits - get yours today and enhance your safety outdoors!
